dialogos.texto_en: (After finishing our visit to Ocean Expo Park%p-2;――%p;)
(Ultimately, we entered the Churaumi Aquarium, \n took a lap around inside, then came back around \n to the large tank.)
Every exhibit was fantastic,\nbut this large tank really is exceptional,\nisn't it?
Indeed, it's the highlight of this place.
I could watch it forever.\nThe colorful fish, manta rays...\nand the whale shark...
Did you like it that much?\nYou seem completely absorbed in it all.
Even in such a huge tank, \nthe whale shark is especially massive.\nI can't help but follow it with my eyes.
The impact is certainly on a different level.
It certainly is overwhelming,\nbut watching it is also soothing to the soul.\nI wonder why?
...Maybe because they swim so leisurely?
Hehe, that could be it.\nEven I don't know myself\nwhy it's my favorite thing here.
But I don't think I'd ever tire of watching it\nall day long.
If that's the case, should we go to \nthe cafe and watch from there?
Yeah, the cafe next to the large tank!\nIt would be nice to take a break\nwhile gazing at it up close.
The fish latte art that was in the guide\nwas also cute.\nI'm sure Ichika would like it too.
Ichika would?
She often takes pictures of those kinds of things\nand uploads them to social media.
What a trendy, stylish thing to do.\nIt's a world very far from my own.
Don't say that.\nI think you should learn\nhow to use social media a little bit.
Well, I'll consider it.
What a half-hearted response.\nThat's why Yotsuba\ncalls you a fashion amateur.
Ugh...\nBut she's talking about clothes, right?
It's the same thing.\nYou're assuming it's something\nyou have no connection with.
...Don't rub it in.
Teehee! It feels good to tease you like this.
By the way, since this creature\nis called a whale shark,\nit's a shark, right?
Of course.\nWhy are you suddenly asking me something so obvious?
I was just thinking about Yotsuba's reaction\nwhen she sees it.
She likes movies with sharks in them,\nbut they're usually more ferocious...\nThey're quite different from whale sharks.
It depends on the species.\nWasn't there a Dr. Shark's room over there?\nYotsuba would love it there.
I can easily imagine her getting excited\nseeing all the shark jawbones lined up there.
Yes, she would probably have a blast.
I do think it's childish, but it's one of\nYotsuba's good qualities that she can\nhonestly express her feelings towards things she likes.
...Yeah.
Hm? What's wrong?
No, when it comes to what we like,\nMiku wanted to see the dolphin show.\nI just remembered that.
The dolphin show?\nWe couldn't see it because of the timing,\nbut that looks good too.
That's too bad,\nbut let's save it for the next time.
Right.\nLeave it so we have a reason to come back here again.
%p-2;――%p; Oh?\nLook, Uesugi-kun.\nDon't you recognize that colorful fish?
No, it's the first time I've seen it.
Really?\nI feel like I've seen it somewhere%p-2;――
Oh! I remember now!\nNino has a dress like this.
Clothes?!
What is it, a dress that looks like a fish?\nI can't imagine it.
No, it's more like the color\nand fluttering feeling are very similar.
Even you, Uesugi-kun, will understand what I'm saying\nwhen you see it!
Well, if she wore it here, she would match.\nHahaha, it's funny to imagine.
That might be nice.\nShould we ask Nino to bring it?
They might think she's one of the fishes.
The fish will probably be surprised too,\nwondering why their friend is outside the tank%p-2;――
What, what's wrong now?
No, it's just that we've only been talking about everyone else.
...I suppose that's true. \nI didn't realize it though.
This kind of conversation probably\ndoesn't seem like something\nthat lovers would have in the general public.
Probably.\nBut isn't it okay?\nThis is our own unique way.
Our own unique way...
You're one of the quintuplets,\nso it's natural to talk about them.
Besides, even if we talk about them,\nthat doesn't change the fact\nthat we're...um, lovers.
Y-yes, that's right.\nI feel like it's okay for now.
Our own unique way...
Hm?
Wait, Yotsuba! You're showing too much!
They're gonna see your ribbon!
Ah! Oh no!
That's...
Was Itsuki-chan even looking this way?
They might have seen it.
...Teehee!
Uesugi-kun.\nShould we head outside now?
Is it okay?\nWe still have time,\nand we can watch more whale sharks.
I want to, but this is our Okinawa trip.\nThere are so many other things I want to see.
We finally got some long-awaited time to ourselves.
O-okay.\nThen, let's go.
